query: light leak halation orange red film overexposed analog
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: light leaks, halation, overexposed film

response.objective_caption: A square abstract image showing a soft, sweeping diagonal gradient transitioning from bright white in the upper left through pale yellow and golden yellow to a warm orange and coral band in the lower right corner. The entire surface exhibits a fine, uniform granular texture resembling analog film grain. No discernible objects, figures, or representational subjects are present.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A square abstract image showing a soft, sweeping diagonal gradient transitioning from bright white in the upper left through pale yellow and golden yellow to a warm orange and coral band in the lower right corner. The image contains no recognizable subjects and functions as pure color-field abstraction, with its meaning deriving entirely from formal qualities of hue, tone, and texture. A fine, pervasive analog-style grain covers the entire surface, lending an organic, tactile imperfection characteristic of traditional photographic film emulsion.
